ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: 74% Pork Shoulder (91% Pork, Water, Glucose Syrup, Salt, Modified Maize Starch, Stabilisers: Diphosphates, Triphosphates; Acidity Regulators: Sodium Citrates, Citric Acid; Yeast Extract), 23% Apple Sauce (31% Apple Purée, Water, Sugar, 9% Apple Juice, Candied Apple [Apple, Sugar, Glucose-Fructose Syrup], 5% Dehydrated Diced Apple [Apple, Preservative: Sodium Metabisulphite], Lemon Juice, Cornflour, Preservative: Potassium Sorbate), 3% Sage and Salt Glaze (Sage, Salt). Allergy Advice For allergens, see ingredients in bold. May also contain Nuts and Peanuts.
